CustomField.formula: IF(ShippingCountry <> "US","NA", IF(CONTAINS("967, 968", left(ShippingPostalCode,3)), "U01", IF(CONTAINS("940, 941, 943, 944, 949, 963, 964, 965, 966", left(ShippingPostalCode,3)), "U02", IF(CONTAINS("939, 950", left(ShippingPostalCode,3)), "U03", IF(CONTAINS("893, 894, 895, 897, 898, 936, 937, 938, 942, 952, 953, 956, 957, 958, 959, 960, 961, 962", left(ShippingPostalCode,3)), "U04", IF(CONTAINS("945, 946, 947, 948, 951", left(ShippingPostalCode,3)), "U06", IF(CONTAINS("954, 955", left(ShippingPostalCode,3)), "U07", IF(CONTAINS("900, 902, 903, 904, 905, 906, 907, 908, 910, 911, 912, 913, 914, 915, 916, 918, 930, 931, 932, 933, 934, 935", left(ShippingPostalCode,3)), "U09", IF(CONTAINS("917, 919, 920, 921, 922, 923, 924, 925, 926, 927, 928", left(ShippingPostalCode,3)), "U10", "NA")))))))))
CustomField.label: GeoCodeUxx
